Concurrent `updateRegistry`/`removeRegistryEntry` operations for sandbox containers and browsers could lose updates or resurrect removed entries under race conditions.

The registry writes were read-modify-write in a window with no locking and permissive fallback parsing, so concurrent registry updates could produce stale snapshots and overwrite each other.

That desyncs sandbox state and can affect `sandbox list`, `sandbox prune`, and `sandbox recreate --all` behavior.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.2.17`
- Patched versions: `2026.2.18`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `cc29be8c9`

OpenClaw thanks @kexinoh for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00134, "percentile": 0.03215}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-03T23:32:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32018"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-19T22:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-03-03T23:32:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cc29be8c9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32018", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cc29be8c9bcdfaecb90f0ab13124c8f5362a6741", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-race-condition-in-sandbox-registry-write-operations", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw's serialize sandbox registry writes to prevent races and delete-rollback corruption", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:58:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq83-8q7q-9hfx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.2.19", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.2.19"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw's serialize sandbox registry writes to prevent races and delete-rollback corruption
